programme.title: Mysteries & Monsters
programme.desc: George Adamski, a controversial ufologist famous for his flying saucer photos, faces skepticism and belief; his photos, still debated, may support his claims of meeting a man from Venus.

programme.title: Mysteries & Monsters

programme.title: Sasquatch Unearthed: Mountain State Monsters
programme.desc: Audio collected and experienced across the state of West Virginia is discussed.

programme.title: Sasquatch Unearthed: Mountain State Monsters

programme.title: Top 10 Secrets and Mysteries
programme.desc: Delve into the most convincing evidence that the planet has been visited by extraterrestrial life forms, from alien encounters in ancient texts to modern-day UFO sightings and the secrets of Area 51.

programme.title: Top 10 Secrets and Mysteries
programme.desc: Some of the most mysterious monsters and mythical creatures that may inhabit this earth, including vampires, Bigfoot and the Loch Ness Monster.

programme.title: Top 10 Secrets and Mysteries
programme.desc: Some of the world's most sacred sites, including the Great Pyramid of Giza, Chartres Cathedral and Masjid Al-Haram.

programme.title: Tamar & Vince
programme.desc: Tamar prepares to drop her next album, while taping a new season of her talk show. When Vince reveals to Tamar that she'll also be competing on "Dancing With The Stars," she's concerned about balancing it all.

programme.title: Tamar & Vince
programme.desc: Tamar hits the road to promote her album in NYC, then rushes to DC for an event with April. Tamar plans her next music video and performs an emotional dance inspired the time when Vince was gravely ill.

programme.title: Tamar & Vince
programme.desc: Tamar travels to the Caribbean to shoot a music video, and worries about losing rehearsal time with her new dance partner. Tamar gets advice from Toni about DWTS and a troubling text on Vince's phone...

programme.title: L.A. Hair
programme.desc: Kim questions Angela's integrity and lack of professionalism. Kelly Rowland needs Kim's help finding a hot style for a high-fashion editorial shoot. Angela and Terry go on a house call from hell.

programme.title: L.A. Hair
programme.desc: After diffusing an insulting situation with reality diva Omarosa, Kim gives a candid interview about her painful childhood. Angela steals one of Kim's clients. Everyone has had enough of Charity.

programme.title: L.A. Hair
programme.desc: Kim gives Angela one more chance at the salon. Jazz and Terry trick Kim into a blind date. China makes her presence known by refusing to give Angela her station and pushing Anthony to his limit.

programme.title: Kendra On Top
programme.desc: With the details of Hank's sex scandal now out in the open, Kendra heads to London for work and play. When a racy photo of Kendra and a former footballer hits the press, Hank questions if Kendra's gone too far.

programme.title: Kendra On Top
programme.desc: Despite Hank's concerns, Kendra continues her wild time in London. After a date with singer Jake Quickenden and a steamy radio interview with host Matt Edmonson, Kendra is warned not to let things go too far.

programme.title: Kendra On Top
programme.desc: Kendra questions if traditional married life is right for her. A therapy session leads to a tearful break down when she admits to texting other men after the scandal.

programme.title: David Tutera's CELEBrations
programme.desc: Actress and singer Vanessa Williams asks David to plan her bridal shower in NYC. David is starstruck by Vanessa, and must work extra hard to create an amazing event, while keeping his excitement in check.

programme.title: David Tutera's CELEBrations
programme.desc: Actor Ian Ziering (90210, Sharknado) hires David to plan a canine charity fundraiser. Can Team Tutera produce a posh event amid the puppy pandemonium? Montre has surprising news and needs David's help.

programme.title: L.A. Hair
programme.desc: Drama is fierce as Anthony double-books China. Kim deals with her nerves while helping the biggest little diva in Hollywood prepare for the Oscars. Mikki Taylor calls on Kim for an editorial shoot.

programme.title: L.A. Hair
programme.desc: Construction of the new salon stalls and Kim is forced to find a temporary location. The war with China takes a nasty turn. Kim styles R&B icons Brandy and Monica for a music video.

programme.title: L.A. Hair
programme.desc: China loses her cool with everyone in the salon, including one of the clients. Kim cuts her hair too short before her second date with Frank. China breaks down and tries to resign as a salon manager.

programme.title: Tamar & Vince
programme.desc: Vince signs new female artists but keeps it a secret from Tamar. Tamar confronts Vince about a text from a woman named Kiki. Tamar shoots a music video with friends. Logan walks in a fashion show at The Real.

programme.title: ¿Quién es quién?
programme.desc: Inés está preocupada por el paradero de Leonardo. Pedro le pide a Basilio que investigue a Edgardo Harrington. Elmer va a casa de Renata y le dice que sus servicios ya no son necesarios. Paloma le permite a Sebastián seguir viendo a Cachito.

programme.title: ¿Quién es quién?
programme.desc: Elmer le cuenta a Renata la verdad sobre Pedro y Leonardo, forcejean y Santiago trata de ayudarla, pero no puede. Llama a Daniela y le dice que secuestraron a Renata. Tania queda en shock al ver a Justino. Magdalena se entera de la verdad.

programme.title: ¿Quién es quién?
programme.desc: Elmer obliga a Renata a llamar a Daniela y decirle que está bien. Ivonne ayuda a Pedro a investigar sobre Edgardo Harrington sin que Ignacio lo sepa. Leonardo trata de demostrarles a todos que dice la verdad con su foto en internet.

programme.title: ¿Quién es quién?
programme.desc: Sebastián intenta besar a Paloma, pero Leonardo llega en ese momento. Ella le confiesa que Sebastián es el papá de Cachito. Leonardo y Paloma se reconcilian. Yesenia encuentra una foto de Leonardo en el celular de Ignacio.

programme.title: ¿Quién es quién?
programme.desc: Ivonne le dice a Pedro que, en el juicio de Santiago, él culpó a Harrington de mandarlo a la cárcel. Inés quiere entregarle a Ignacio su celular, pero él manda a su matón a recuperarlo. Inés escapa, pero Humberto la atropella.

programme.title: ¿Quién es quién?
programme.desc: Basilio y Pedro planean encontrar las pruebas para desenmascarar a Ignacio. Leonardo le muestra a Paloma las fotos del celular y le dice que él es Leonardo y no Pedro. Ignacio le pide al Chamoy que recupere su celular.

programme.title: ¿Quién es quién?
programme.desc: Leonardo y Paloma tratan de buscar la verdad. Basilio va a la inauguración de los productos de Cocó para buscar información sobre Leonardo. Paloma llama a Leonardo por su verdadero nombre. Ignacio amenaza con un arma al Chamoy.

programme.title: ¿Quién es quién?
programme.desc: Chamoy amenaza con matar a Ignacio si él le hace daño a su familia. Basilio le dice a Pedro que Leonardo se está volviendo loco, Fernanda los escucha. Ignacio y Chamoy se enteran de que Leonardo tiene el celular.

programme.title: ¿Quién es quién?
programme.desc: Paloma enfrenta a Ignacio por su mentira, él le dice que Leonardo lo está estafando. Pedro le dice a Ignacio que no se meta con Paloma ni le haga daño. Leonardo tiene recuerdos de Humberto y de Nora. Paloma reconoce a Basilio.

programme.title: ¿Quién es quién?
programme.desc: Pedro le cuenta a Chamoy lo que le está pidiendo Ignacio, él le dice que obedezca. Sebastián les informa a todos que Leonardo tiene una intoxicación por drogas. Fabiola le pide a Ignacio que mate a Matías.

programme.title: ¿Quién es quién?
programme.desc: Cachito escucha que Sebastián es su papá y se alegra al saber la verdad. Elmer le insinúa a Inés que su hijo está en malos pasos y esconde droga en la ropa de Leonardo. Basilio le dice a Pedro que Leonardo no es un drogadicto.

programme.title: ¿Quién es quién?
programme.desc: Ignacio amenaza a Matías con matar a Connie si no firma los papeles de divorcio, lo obliga a firmar y luego lo mata. Fernanda le pregunta a Pedro quién es don Leonardo, él le miente. Inés le dice a Leonardo que consumió alguna droga alucinógena.

programme.title: ¿Quién es quién?
programme.desc: Inés se encuentra con Humberto y le pregunta su apellido, le dice que es Fuentemayor. Eugenio le dice a Paloma que su padre está preso. Fabiola le tiende una trampa a Rubén y busca a Yesenia para enfrentarla.

programme.title: ¿Quién es quién?
programme.desc: Inés descubre que el hijo de Humberto se llama Leonardo. Paloma le dice a Leonardo que fue a buscar a Ignacio. Elmer se enterada de que Fernanda es la esposa de Pedro. Le avisan a Daniela que su hermana murió.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Truckers often know where to find the best home-style cooking. And what could be better than chicken-fried steak with cream gravy and real coconut cream pie?

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Although chicken dinners are quick to prepare, they can go terribly wrong. Part of the problem is the chicken itself—the breast meat has little fat and becomes dry and chalky if overcooked. The other major source of trouble is improper cooking methods.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: French country cooking has a way with chicken in a pot, whether it's the famous chicken with 40 cloves of garlic or the lesser-known chicken Provençal. These dishes take chicken to new heights—or go awry.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Purchase a good steak and cook it properly, and all it needs is salt and pepper—and, of course, a side of spuds. We wanted potatoes with perfect texture and big flavor—something unusual to accompany a great steak and a good bottle of wine.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Restaurant steak tips are often tough and weirdly seasoned, and thick steak fries can be pale and soggy. The test kitchen felt confident that we could rescue these dishes and turn them into something you would welcome into your home.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Preparing favorite French dishes such as cassoulet or tarte Tatin calls for a lot of patience and time. We wondered if we could find ways to simplify these recipes without sacrificing the qualities that make them classics.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Few recipes deliver so much pleasure for so little work as pancakes. The batter comes together in minutes, and the cooking time is brief. Why, then, do most Americans never make pancakes from scratch?

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Although easy to prepare, most cookie recipes are notoriously fickle. A minor ingredient change or fluctuation in oven temperature can yield unexpected results. Our goal was simple: Take two favorite cookies and develop reliable recipes that taste great.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: The test kitchen decided to tackle two popular sheet cakes—carrot and chocolate—and produce simple recipes that would deliver superior results.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Although some would never dare to adulterate plain cheesecake, variations abound—some good, some bad, some ugly. We wanted our cheesecake to be both light and creamy, with great lemon flavor.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: When entertaining, we like desserts that look more complicated to prepare than they really are. A chocolate mousse cake or chilled lemon soufflé requires basic ingredients but is sure to elicit the proper oohs and aahs from guests.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: We like appetizers that deliver big flavor without much work. This means spiced nuts that are not overly sweet, spinach dip that is bold and creamy (not watery and insipid), and beef satay that is tender and vibrant.

programme.title: Cook's Country
programme.desc: Bryan makes Julia a New York classic, Prosciutto Bread. Then, Jack challenges Bridget to a tasting of provolone cheese. Finally, Ashley shows Bridget how to make the easiest-ever Drop Meatballs.

programme.title: Cook's Country
programme.desc: Bryan uncovers the secrets to making Hawaiian-Style Fried Chicken with Bridget. Next, Adam reviews plastic wrap with Julia. Then, Jack challenges Bridget to a tasting of potato chips. Finally, Natalie makes Julia Hawaiian Macaroni Salad.

programme.title: Cook's Country
programme.desc: Natalie prepares Cast Iron Baked Chicken with Bridget. Next, Jack challenges Julia to a tasting of hot sauce. Finally, Ashley shows Julia how to make foolproof Blueberry Cornbread with Honey Butter.

programme.title: Cook's Country
programme.desc: Christie and Julia reveal the steps to making a showstopping Blueberry Jam Cake. Then, Adam reviews toasters with Bridget.

programme.title: Julia at Home
programme.desc: Julia makes roast beef weeknight-friendly with her cast-iron roast beef with gravy, salt-crusted fingerling potatoes, and carrot-noodle salad with homemade harissa and honey.

programme.title: Julia at Home
programme.desc: Julia makes her favorite weeknight dinner featuring a butterflied and Za'tar rubbed roast chicken with homemade preserved lemons, kale and sweet potato salad with pomegranate vinaigrette, and cozy coconut rice pudding.

programme.title: Julia at Home
programme.desc: Julia makes a celebratory dinner inspired by Italy: fresh halibut puttanesca, garlicky broccolini, crispy polenta triangles, and olive-oil yogurt cake for dessert.

programme.title: Julia at Home
programme.desc: Julia plans a date night with Ian featuring herb-crusted beef tenderloin for two, air-fryer cheesy potatoes, marinated tomato salad with arugula and goat cheese, followed by decadent creme brulees for two.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Most cooks are under the impression that good soup takes all day to prepare. We'll show you how to make simplified versions of two favorite soups: chicken noodle and Italian pasta and bean.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Soup for supper is an appealing concept, especially on a cold night. But for soup to work as a main course, it better be hearty. Our vibrant lentil soup fits the bill, and we round out this meal with quick cheese bread.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Some local dishes become so popular that they transcend their region. Gumbo is a taste of Louisiana in a big old bowl. And Cincinnati chili is American original, served with buttered spaghetti, kidney beans, cheddar cheese, and chopped onions.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: It sometimes seems the simplest recipes suffer the worst fate in modern cookbooks. The test kitchen was committed to breathing new life into these old-fashioned American recipes: stuffed pork chops, gravy, and glazed carrots.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: We offer two inspired takes on roast chicken. Our roast lemon chicken ends with a twist. And there's nothing conventional about cooking a butterflied chicken under a brick. But these two recipes both deliver crisp skin and lots of flavors.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Quick and easy weeknight cooking can still yield great results. We start with two quick-cooking classics— sautéed chicken cutlets and pan-seared shrimp—and elevate them from the everyday.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: In this episode, we offer delicious, relatively straightforward fare that appeals to young and old. What kid—or adult—doesn't look forward to macaroni and cheese or barbecued chicken?

programme.title: Cowboy Logic
programme.desc: Hosted by Donna Fiducia, a former Fox News Channel anchor and Don Neuen, a politically incorrect cowboy.

programme.title: Ringside Politics

programme.desc: News and insight to kick start the day.

programme.title: American Greed
programme.desc: U.S. law enforcement teams up with Jamaican authorities to stop criminals using call centers in Jamaica to flood the U.S. with lies about lottery millions won by unsuspecting victims.

programme.title: American Greed
programme.desc: Ed Shin is an entrepreneur, churchgoer and family man; when his business partner suddenly vanishes, prompting the family to seek answers, a private eye digs into Shin's past and finds something horrifying.

programme.title: American Greed
programme.desc: How multibillion-dollar company Pacific Gas & Electric comes to repeatedly kill its customers by putting profits over safety as alleged by critics.

programme.title: American Greed
programme.desc: Idaho Guardsman Darryl Wright claims he suffers from post-traumatic stress disorder from his service in Iraq, but his story is an elaborate scam that allows him to live large without working and to steal resources from veterans who truly need help.

programme.title: American Greed
programme.desc: College admissions coach Rick Singer accepts money from parents to have their kids admitted to elite colleges.

programme.title: American Greed
programme.desc: Vitaly Borker scores $18 million selling designer knock-off eyewear as genuine from his website in Brooklyn, N.Y.; when customers complain, they are threatened with violence, even murder.

programme.title: American Greed
programme.desc: Kenny Chatman runs a string of corrupt drug rehab facilities in South Florida stealing millions by keeping insured addicts hooked on drugs; his plans include turning patients into prostitutes and sober homes into drug-fueled brothels.

programme.title: American Greed
programme.desc: A former champion basketball player's schemes land him in prison and his mother gets kicked out of her home.

programme.title: American Greed
programme.desc: A phony psychic scams a wealthy but lonely timber baron out of millions while her devious daughter pretends to be in love with him.

programme.title: American Greed
programme.desc: When a judge in Texas is shot four times, a tip leads investigators to Chimene Onyeri, an aspiring Houston rap artist facing prison after his crooked card skimming plots are exposed.

programme.title: American Greed
programme.desc: Attorney Michael Avenatti has legal troubles of his own when he represents porn star Stormy Daniels in her dispute with President Donald Trump.

programme.title: American Greed
programme.desc: Using powers of persuasion, along with classic multilevel marketing techniques; amassing thousands of followers -- many of them rich and famous -- and hundreds of millions of dollars in contributions.

programme.title: American Greed
programme.desc: In Dallas, a delusional, debt-ridden, and allegedly drug-dabbling spine surgeon maims and even kills patients in one botched surgery after another; it falls to two colleagues to step in where others won't and bring him down.

programme.desc: Yukako’s dangerous obsession with reshaping Koichi into a man fit for her gets worse, prompting Koichi to hatch an escape plan. He tries to call Josuke for help using a nearby pay phone but is stopped by Yukako, who anticipated his move.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Let’s Go Eat Some Italian Food
programme.desc: Josuke and Okuyasu come across an Italian restaurant owned by an Italian chef named Tonio. When Okuyasu asks for the menu, Tonio explains that he decides the menu on the spot based on the customer he sees.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Chili Pepper, Part 1
programme.desc: Chili Pepper suddenly appears before Josuke to test his Stand powers. Josuke puts up a fight but is overwhelmed by Chili Pepper’s power. The next day, Josuke and friends learn from Jotaro that a man who can locate Chili Pepper is heading to Morioh

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Chili Pepper, Part 2
programme.desc: Josuke and his friends gather at the Port to try and reach Joseph Joestar before Chili Pepper. Speculating the enemy is hiding nearby, Jotaro orders Josuke and Koichi to stay behind and find Chili Pepper’s user while he and Okuyasu go protect Joseph.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: We Picked Up Something Crazy!
programme.desc: With Akira Otoishi arrested and the bow and arrow safely recovered, peace seemingly returns to Morioh. But Josuke’s life is far from peaceful as he struggles to deal with his father, whose old age is making things difficult for them to bond.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Let's Go to the Manga Artist's House, Part 1
programme.desc: Koichi and Hazamada visit the home of Rohan Kishibe, a popular manga artist whom they are huge fans of. Much to their joy, Rohan not only agrees to sign autographs but also invites them to take a tour of his workspace.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Let's Go to the Manga Artist's House, Part 2
programme.desc: Koichi is drawn back to Rohan’s house, where he sees the manga artist finishing up his next manga at an incredible speed. Rohan uses his stand Heaven’s Door on Koichi again to gain further creative inspiration from the young boy’s life experience.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Let's Go Hunting!
programme.desc: Jotaro and Josuke must hunt down a rat that is believed to have become a Stand user after being shot by the bow and arrow. When the two arrive at the site, they find dozens of dead rats killed in the most bizarre fashion.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: It's Jonathan Pratt's last day to claw back some profit to try and catch the mighty Phil Serrell as they motor from Sheffield to auction in Wilmslow.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Anita Manning and James Lewis take to the road as they go head-to-head to try and make the most profit from buying and selling antiques. They start their journey in Pateley Bridge, Yorkshire, and end up at the auction in Grimsby.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Anita Manning and James Lewis continue to battle it out, starting in Horncastle, Lincolnshire, and ending up at an auction showdown in Diss, Norfolk.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Anita Manning is close on the heels of James Lewis as they battle it out to become king or queen of antiques profits. Winding through the English countryside, they start in Fakenham ending up with an auction in Aylsham.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: James Lewis has nudged ahead in the antique profit stakes but Anita Manning is fighting back hard. It's still all to play for as they start the day's journey in Needham Market, Suffolk, and end with an exciting auction in Bedford.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: It's the last day for Anita Manning to snatch the lead from James Lewis as they start in Woburn in Bedfordshire and end up at a gripping auction in Cirencester, Gloucestershire.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: It's the first day for Charlie Ross and James Braxton to take to the road, and what a day it is! Their adventures start in the Highlands of Scotland in a small town called Cromarty and end in Buckie at a record-breaking auction showdown.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: After the excitement of yesterday's auction James Braxton has a long way to go to catch Charlie Ross. Beginning in the fishing village of Cullen in the Highlands of Scotland, they end up in Aberdeen for the auction showdown.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Charlie Ross and James Braxton battle it out for antiques as they wind through Scotland, starting in Tarland en route to auction in Hamilton.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Charlie Ross and James Braxton cruise for antiques in their classic 1954 Alpine Sunbeam which takes them through the scenic town of Blairgowrie to Glasgow for the auction showdown.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: It's been an incredible week for Charlie Ross who is well in front of James Braxton as they fight to become the king of buying and selling antiques. They start their final day in Kilbarchan and end at an auction showdown in Ayre, Scotland.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Veteran road tripper David Barby joins up with silver expert Margie Cooper for a mammoth journey from Northumberland to Lincolnshire in their classic car. Each expert aims to buy and auction antiques for profit but it's not plane sailing.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: It's day two and experts David Barby and Margie Cooper are battling it out in County Durham before winding their way to the auction in Scarborough.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: David Barby and Margie Cooper embark on day three of the road trip from Bridlington to Sheffield, and on their way they buy some surprising items.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Antiques Roadshow is at Battle Abbey, where treasures brought along include an incredibly rare Beatles guitar with an enviable history, which turns out to be one of the most valuable items ever seen on the show.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Antiques Roadshow is in the grounds of Salisbury Cathedral in Wiltshire, where experts discover an eclectic mix of treasures including Napoleon's razor, letters from Enid Blyton and a piece of Queen Victoria's underwear.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: The roadshow comes from the foreshore beside the V&A Dundee design museum in Scotland. Fiona Bruce goes aboard the Discovery to uncover the epic story of the ship and Antarctic explorer Robert Falcon Scott.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: The roadshow comes from the lush surroundings of the National Botanic Garden of Wales in Carmarthenshire. Fiona Bruce explores the Victorian mania for collecting exotic plants and examines rare species grown inside the gigantic bio-dome.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Antiques Roadshow returns to the vibrant setting of Morden Hall Park in south London. We discover personal letters written by Mother Teresa and an exquisite bronze by the father of South African sculpture, Anton Van Wouw.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: At Lytham Hall in Lancashire, finds include a chair that is believed to be from Nelson's flagship, a gruesome insight into Victorian dentistry and a fantastic series of watercolours rescued from a skip and worth thousands.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Antiques Roadshow returns to the magnificent setting of Compton Verney in Warwickshire. Treasures brought in include illustrations from the 1930s, bronze statues from Benin in West Africa and a rare Chinese incense burner worth a small fortune.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Antiques Roadshow returns to Castle Ward in Northern Ireland, an unusual 18th-century mansion and backdrop to hit TV series Game of Thrones.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Antiques Roadshow comes from the lush surroundings of the National Botanic Garden of Wales in Carmarthenshire, where Fiona Bruce discovers how plant-based remedies were mixed and bottled by Victorian pharmacists.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce presents a special episode of Antiques Roadshow commemorating the 80th anniversary of the Battle of Britain and the Blitz.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow Detectives
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and experts from BBC1's popular Antiques Roadshow turn sleuth as they explore intriguing stories behind family heirlooms. Hilary Kay investigates a rare artifact that's said to have adorned Oliver Cromwell's funeral procession.

programme.title: Sharks: Size Matters
programme.desc: Sharks with horns; sharks that walk on their fins; a nuclear submarine is disabled by a shark.

programme.title: Ten Deadliest Sharks
programme.desc: A countdown and a death-defying journey to meet ten of the word's deadliest sharks.

programme.title: Ten Deadliest Sharks
programme.desc: The epic conclusion to the death-defying journey to meet ten of the word's deadliest sharks.

programme.title: Sharks: On Their Best Behavior
programme.desc: Filmmaker Mike deGruy examines shark evolution, hunting, feeding, reproduction and defenses.

programme.title: Wildlife Specials
programme.desc: An in-depth look into wildlife and nature.

programme.title: Dolphins: Spy in the Pod
programme.desc: Spinner dolphins hunt shoals of lanternfish while dodging giant rays.

programme.title: Dolphins: Spy in the Pod
programme.desc: Revealing the family life of the orca and dolphins that wear sponges on their noses.

programme.title: Natural World
programme.desc: Wildlife and the environment.

programme.title: Sharks: The Truth
programme.desc: Having evolved over millions of years, sharks make for the most effective underwater hunters on Earth.

programme.desc: Sharks with horns; sharks that walk on their fins; a nuclear submarine is disabled by a shark.

programme.title: Nigellissima
programme.desc: Liquorice pudding; Sardinian sun-dried and toasted couscous; butterflied leg of lamb; baby aubergines with oregano and roasted red onion.

programme.title: Nigellissima
programme.desc: Nigella starts with her take on a light and sunny yogurt pot cake; she recruits her niece and nephew to make a shortcut sausage meatball supper; Nigella prepares squid and prawns with marjoram and chili; a tiramisini ends the evening.

programme.title: Nigellissima
programme.desc: Lamb chops with mint; chilli and golden potatoes; ruby red plum and amoretti crumble; farro risotto with mushrooms.

programme.title: Rachel Khoo's Kitchen Notebook: London
programme.desc: Rachel celebrates the quirkiness and individuality of London fashion in her kitchen, proving it's more about creativity than the price tag when it comes to getting your food looking and tasting good.

programme.title: Rachel Khoo's Kitchen Notebook: London
programme.desc: Rachel makes some simple colorful canapés that are perfect for a party and creates a sophisticated jelly for grown-ups.

programme.title: Rachel Khoo's Kitchen Notebook: London
programme.desc: London makes Rachel feel nostalgic about her childhood, so she visits an ice-cream lab in North London and makes a firm family favorite - Strudel.

programme.title: Rachel Khoo's Kitchen Notebook: London
programme.desc: Rachel explores London's fast food scene, and whips up berry tartlets with cream cheese frosting and cauliflower cheese burgers.

programme.title: Rachel Khoo's Kitchen Notebook: London
programme.desc: Rachel prepares her favourite food for the perfect lazy day, cycles along a canal, visits her friend Tom's urban garden, and whips up a shepherdless pie.

programme.title: Rachel Khoo's Kitchen Notebook: London

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep3
programme.desc: Bairon es atacado, el hombre se oculta en la casa de su madre Hilda. Caballo busca a Catalina para matarla y que no se entere su patrón que él le quito la virginidad a la mujer. Albeiro le propone matrimonio a su novia. La Diabla habla con los capos

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep4
programme.desc: La Diabla le consigue las modelos a Cardona y Morón. Albeiro le propone a Catalina irse a vivir juntos, ella lo rechaza. Catalina se entera de que está embarazada y aborta. Jessica lleva a su amiga a una fiesta de modelos realizada por mafiosos

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep5
programme.desc: Catalina se separa de Albeiro por un tiempo por lo último que le ha ocurrido. Cardona se acuesta con Catalina, la mujer le pide dinero al mafioso para la operación de sus senos. Caballo es asesinado. Cardona le pide a la niña que sea su amante

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep6
programme.desc: Cardona le da el dinero a Catalina, la mujer junto a la Diabla averiguan la cotización de la operación de su busto. Hilda se emborracha con Albeiro. Orlando es asesinado. Catalina se encuentra con su novio y su madre ebrios, se enfada.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep7
programme.desc: Catalina le declara su amor a Albeiro, sin embargo le aclara el no poder volver junto a él en estos momentos. Catalina se encuentra en un bar con Cardona y el Titi, Cardona le da dinero para que siga siendo su amante. Albeiro duerme con Hilda.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep8
programme.desc: Bairon asesina a una persona como sicario en su nueva profesión. Catalina se enfada con Cardona al enterarse de que el mafioso huyo del país por el allanamiento que hizo la policía. Jessica y Catalina viajan a Bogotá en busca de oportunidades laborales.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep9
programme.desc: Las amigas de la Diabla y Catalina empiezan a trabajar en un prostíbulo tras la mala situación económica que hay en el pueblo. Catalina tiene sexo con el Dr. Mauricio para que le ponga los implantes de seno. Albeiro e Hilda tienen una relación.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep10
programme.desc: Benjamín les exige sexo a las mujeres por la estadía, las chicas cachetean al hombre. Jessica y Catalina se refugian en una estación de policía, empeñan las joyas que le robaron al antiguo anfitrión. Mauricio evade a Catalina en la clínica.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep11
programme.desc: Hilda le declara su amor a Albeiro, los dos hacen el amor. Bairon se percata de lo sucedido y acepta el noviazgo de su madre con el supuesto novio de Catalina. La familia celebra el cumpleaños de Catalina.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep12
programme.desc: Catalina hace el amor con Albeiro después de embriagarlo para que no se note la pérdida de su virginidad. Catalina y Jessica se devuelven a Bogotá. El hombre oscuro contrata a Bairon para matar a un político.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep13
programme.desc: El hombre oscuro le da la misión a Bairon y a su compañero de eliminar al magistrado con un tiempo límite de un mes. Catalina seduce a Octavio. El hombre las echa de la casa. Las mujeres se encuentran con el doctor para la cirugía de los senos.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep14
programme.desc: A Catalina le realizan la operación, las mujeres son echadas del apartamento de Octavio pues él se ha enamorado de ella y se percata de una mentira por parte de ella. La mujer se ve con el Titi el cual se entusiasma por verla operada.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep15
programme.desc: Catalina empieza con su cronograma de trabajo como prepago. Albeiro se encuentra en Bogotá con Octavio, se entera de muchas cosas de su novia. El guardaespaldas le cuenta a su patrón Marcial haberse enamorado de Catalina.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep16
programme.desc: Catalina convence a su novio de estar juiciosa en la capital, los dos hacen el amor. Hilda se entera y cachetea a su hija. Catalina se ve con el Titi y lo golpea, el mafioso la manda a matar junto a Jessica. Las mujeres se refugian donde Marcial.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep17
programme.desc: Catalina acepta vivir donde Marcial para ocultarse del Titi. Albeiro se muda donde Hilda, comienzan su relación amorosa. Catalina entra al concurso de ''Miss Chica Linda'', Marcial trata de asegurar la victoria de la mujer.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep18
programme.desc: Mauricio advierte a Catalina del peligro que posee si no le quita las prótesis. La gente del barrio ven el reinado, la mujer pelea con otra concursante, Catalina no gana. La mujer vuelve a su pueblo, se percata que Albeiro vive ahora con su madre

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: When an old-school Memphis, TN, cigar shop owner opens an adjacent cocktail bar and hires his son as manager, the bar quickly becomes an afterthought.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon returns to Puerto Rico, where he used to live, to rescue a bar destroyed by Hurricane Maria and to help revive the rest of the community.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon is in Albuquerque, New Mexico, to help Commander Rudy and his staff recruit young veterans to become members and inject new life into his VFW Post 6216 bar and hall.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon must help a struggling establishment figure out if it's a club, a restaurant, or a bar, in the highly competitive market of Las Vegas.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: An explosive conflict breaks out among the owners of Dale 1891 when Jon discovers one of them has been siphoning off profits.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: If Jon is going to save the Liquid Lounge in Long Beach, CA, the first thing he has to do is eliminate the bar's serious ant problem.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon is called in to help the owner of an Omaha, NE, hookah bar whose money is going up in smoke thanks to his staff's frat-house ways.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: In the heart of Texas, Jon must help an owner figure out how to be a better boss and help her personal assistant step up to lead the bar.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: If Jon can't resurrect the menu and whip the staff into shape, then the coastal Massachusetts establishment Libads Bar & Grill will be lost at sea.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon tries to help the owner of New England's Ale House Grille, a single mom who's become reliant on a rude, incompetent manager since her husband left.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon must restore trust between owners and curb rampant theft among employees to save Barlow's, a failing Georgia sports bar.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon heads to Texas to help a husband and wife rescue their failing bar and learn how to be better partners in business.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon has to convince the foul-mouthed co-owner of the Lucky Leprechaun to change his ways before the bar, also co-owned by his ex-wife, shuts down for good.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon must get identical twins with identical egos to see eye-to-eye if they are to curb a dangerous over-pouring problem and save RG's Lounge in Kansas City, MO.

programme.title: Baywatch Hawaii
programme.desc: Baywatch faces two bizarre lawsuits. Kekoa’s father wants her to break up with JD and quit lifeguarding. Zack runs the new Junior Lifeguards program. A government Investigation puts Sean’s job and the future of the Training Center in jeopardy.

programme.title: Baywatch Hawaii
programme.desc: A hurricane hits Hawaii. Sean and Jenna get trapped in a WWII bunker and must put their hatred aside and work together to escape. Zack is trapped in headquarters with a thrill-seeking reporter that puts their lives in danger to get her story.

programme.title: Baywatch Hawaii
programme.desc: Jenna invests all her money with an investment banker who turns out to be a con man. Derek Hart is the kind of man JD wishes he was. But when Derek jumps off a cliff, JD and Jason dive in to save his life, in more ways than one!

programme.title: Baywatch Hawaii
programme.desc: Zack corrupts the headquarters’ computer system forcing everyone to work in the Dark Ages. Sean is freaked because a major donor is about to arrive in the midst of chaos. Jason saves Brit from her ex.

programme.title: Baywatch Hawaii
programme.desc: Kekoa is devastated when Jessie tells JD that he’s the father of her child. A rescued bodyboarder is paralyzed. Sean has a romantic encounter with a beautiful, woman he thinks might really be Pele, the goddess fire.

programme.title: Baywatch Hawaii
programme.desc: Investigating toxic dumping, Sean and Leigh end up chained inside a chamber slowly filling with toxic seawater. Can Sam get them out in time? To raise money, Jason and Zack have to hula dance in grass skirts in front of a lot of women.

programme.title: Baywatch Hawaii
programme.desc: Leigh takes over at Baywatch while Sean, Jason, and Zack go to compete in a 12-mile race of natural obstacles. Jessie’s presence at the race creates turmoil. Leigh and Jenna pretend to be lesbian lovers.

programme.title: Baywatch Hawaii
programme.desc: For a rescue, Sean is awarded a free week at Hilton Hawaiian Village, which he declines. Zack pretends he’s Sean and enjoys all the freebies until Sean shows up! A pretty fashion photographer thinks Jason has top model potential.

programme.title: Baywatch Hawaii
programme.desc: Sean has a decision – move to Australia or stay in Hawaii. Zack sees Leigh naked, leading to complications with her fiancé Sam. Kekoa dumps JD and becomes a party girl. When Sam leaves Leigh at the altar, Sean asks Leigh to marry him instead.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Craig rescues a woman that develops a fatal attraction to him, placing Craig's wife in mortal danger. A fishing trip goes horribly wrong when the boat explodes and Mitch and his mentor Al have to rescue its passengers, including Mitch’s son Hobie.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Playing hooky from summer school, Lt. Mitch Buchannon's son Hobie gets dangerously involved with reckless jet skiers.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: During the hottest day of the summer, Craig has to choose between his career as a lawyer and the job he loves being a Baywatch lifeguard. The choice is made when two boys get trapped in a storm drain which is rapidly filling with water.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Eddie must come to terms with his past when he confronts a gang of "surf rats" lead by a former friend from his reform school days. Trevor begins to doubt his lifeguarding skill when his girlfriend almost drowns because of his arrogance.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator MMA returns to Thackerville as Eduardo Dantas puts his Bantamweight world title on the line against Darrion Caldwell. This stacked fight card also features Daniel Straus taking on Emmanuel Sanchez and Pat Curran facing off against John Macapa.

programme.title: Bellator 185: Mousasi vs. Shlemenko
programme.desc: The elite two-division threat, Gegard Mousasi makes his Bellator debut against former Middleweight Champion Alexander Shlemenko who is on a five-fight win streak.

programme.title: Bellator 186: Bader vs Vassell
programme.desc: Bellator MMA heads to Penn State as accomplished alumni Phil Davis and Ed Ruth return to their roots. Light Heavyweight Champ Ryan Bader defends his belt. Plus Ilima-Lei Macfarlane and Emily Ducote clash for the inaugural flyweight world title!

programme.title: Bellator 187: McKee vs Moore
programme.desc: Bellator MMA returns to Dublin as Irish fan-favorite Brian Moore meets undefeated rising sensation, AJ McKee. Baby Slice returns to the cage, and Conor McGregor’s training partner Charlie Ward battles John Redmond in a fight sure to provide fireworks!

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator is back with featherweight action as world champion Julia Budd puts her title on the line in a grudge rematch against Australian Arlene Blencowe.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator returns to Italy with a huge middleweight world title fight. Local hero Alessio Sakara will have the crowd on his side as he looks to dethrone current champion Rafael Carvalho, who comes in riding a six fight Bellator win streak of his own.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator brings the fight action from Newcastle, UK, as two newly inked superstars make their Bellator debuts. Both Valérie Létourneau and Michael McDonald will look for statement wins in the Bellator cage as they aim to send a message to their rivals.

programme.title: Bellator 192: Rampage vs Sonnen
programme.desc: Bellator MMA takes over The Forum with a highly anticipated showdown between “The American Gangster” Chael Sonnen and Rampage Jackson. Also, Douglas Lima and Rory MacDonald clash for the welterweight belt and Michael Chandler collides with Goiti Yamauchi.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator MMA comes to Pechanga Resort and Casino with a contender showdown as Lorenz Larkin takes on Fernando Gonzalez. Plus Saad Awad looks to keep his hot streak alive against J .J. Ambrose. And AJ Matthews goes to war when he faces Kendall Grove!

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Do you have a relative scheming to get money from a rich aunt, uncle or even parents when they pass away?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Caroline & Sonny admit their nearly 3-yr marriage has been tumultuous with both sides alleging verbal & physical abuse. The situation worsened when the unthinkable happened: Sonny cheated on Caroline with her sister, Ashley, after a night of drinking.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: As children they were forced into a religious sect that sexually abused them & controlled their lives. Now, 30 years after an intense police raid shut down "The Zion Society", some of its victims gather for the first time to share stories of survival.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Monica's old life: English teacher, marathon runner, happy. Now 90 lbs. and no solid food with a C-diff diagnosis, she chains herself to bed to avoid sleepwalking or binge eating. It's a full-time job for mom, Stephanie; friend Breanna suspects enabling.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: When Jenaye posted an emotional video online about uncovering her husband James's infidelity she never imagined it would go viral. Discovering James slept with his hairstylist on their fifth anniversary, Jenaye says divorce might be the best option.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Are you the kind of neighbor who loans a cup of sugar and always waves hello, or do you keep to yourself and call the cops the minute you hear loud music? Dr. Phil talks to guests who say they definitely don't live in Mr. Roger's neighborhood!

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Is it wrong to go dating for dollars? Dr. Phil's guests say if you want to court them, you have to pay to play! Two self-proclaimed gold diggers share their tips for getting loot, and a woman wonders if it's wrong to be attracted to wealthy men.

programme.title: Dr. Phil

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: If you're in difficult economic times & looking for ways to save money, start taking notes! Dr. Phil's guests offer tips to help save on clothes, utilities & vacations. Learn how to cut your grocery bill in half & how to entertain family inexpensively.

programme.desc: Are you ignoring warning signs in your relationship? Is there something concerning you that you haven't addressed? Dr. Phil warns his viewers: Don't think your problems will go away once you walk down the aisle, face the issues now before it's too late!

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: En Los Ángeles, Gibbs y McGee siguen colaborando con la división del NCIS para rastrear a un grupo terrorista.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Cuando asesinan a un agente de ICE tras una brecha de seguridad en la casa del Secretario de la Marina, el equipo del NCIS tiene que colaborar con el FBI y el ICE para resolver el caso.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Después de la confrontación entre Tony y Rivkin, el equipo del NCIS viaja a Israel para una confrontación final, pero no son bien recibidos por el padre de Ziva, que es el jefe del Mossad.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Una serie de secuestros dirigidos cerca de Memphis tiene la BAU en busca de una coincidencia entre las personas desaparecidas y un motivo que les llevará al sospechoso.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando las víctimas son encontradas muertas por envenenamiento con arsénico en Long Beach, California, amenazas de muerte escritas a mano y otras pistas hacen que la UAC busque a un sujeto fascinado con la mitología griega.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando la UAC es llamada a Texas para realizar consultas sobre los asesinatos de prostitutas, la evidencia apunta a asesinatos con connotaciones religiosas. Pero a medida que profundicen en la investigación, el equipo podría poner en riesgo sus vidas.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: La UAC continúa su investigación de asesinato en Texas y las pistas descubren una profunda red de corrupción que podría ser el motivo de los asesinatos.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español)
programme.desc: When Joe Hill's lineage as a Reagan is revealed, Frank struggles from a distance when his grandson wants to fight his own battles. Also, Danny's opposition to authority clashes with Jamie's adherence to the rules, as both brothers work to solve a murder.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español)
programme.desc: Frank must decide whether the department can accommodate a request to remain in the field from Detective Allison Mulaney (Ali Stroker), a lauded cop who is wheelchair-bound after being wounded in the line of duty.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español)
programme.desc: Eddie and her partner, Officer Rachel Witten (Lauren Patten), are heralded for their bravery for stopping an active shooter, until a civilian comes forward to accuse them of faking the incident as part of a government conspiracy.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español)
programme.desc: The Reagans confront hard choices on the job when Frank deals with a police captain who's losing his grip over his precinct, and Danny faces backlash from the Baez and Internal Affairs over a tough call he made in the field.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El equipo de NCIS investiga y se ocupa de la muerte de Kate, Gibbs se emplea en poner fin al reinado de Ari en sus terroríficos montajes. Ziva David (Cote de Pablo), entrará como nuevo agente y compañero del equipo de investigación criminal.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El equipo de NCIS investiga y se ocupa de la muerte de Kate, Gibbs se emplea en poner fin al reinado de Ari en sus terroríficos montajes. Ziva David (Cote de Pablo), entrará como nuevo agente y compañero del equipo de investigación criminal.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Por orden del Gobernador de Virginia, un escéptico Gibbs se ve obligado a reunirse con un asesino en serie al que ayudó a condenar una década antes bajo el pretexto de que el asesino le dirá a Gibbs dónde escondió cadáveres desaparecidos.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Kelli gives the ladies a tough kick line and jump-split workout, and choreographer Travis Wall teaches them a modern dance that will determine their future in the competition.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Charm La'Donna teaches the candidates a hip-hop-style routine, the judges pick their charm squad, the ladies visit the Dallas VA Medical Center and two rookies are sent home.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The candidates audition for the show group, an honorary contingent of 18 cheerleaders who represent the DCC on USO tours and TV, in front of guest judge Cheryl Burke.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Emmy-winner Tyce Diorio teaches the ladies to bring the magic as he puts them through a tough routine. Evan Miller challenges the DCC's power and musicality.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The DCC take the field for the first time in their signature DCC boots. Learning the DCC entrance proves very challenging for some, while others struggle to get accustomed to dancing in cowboy boots. Melissa Rycroft is featured.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The recruits do media training with NBC 5 Dallas-Fort Worth lead news anchors Meredith Land, Kelli, and Judy name two triangle points, and guest judge Melissa Rycroft sits in.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The ladies put their modeling skills to the test on photoshoot day, Julia tries to bounce back after her car accident, and the dancers get a lesson in healthy cooking.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: With one week until the start of the season, Kelli and Judy make a tough cut, the show group performs for the first time, and Charlotte Jones Anderson judges rehearsal.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: To make their final cut, Kelli and her team try to find one hopeful of the remaining 37 who isn't ready to perform at the Cowboys' home opener.

programme.title: Party Down South

programme.desc: Aired 10/12/14. Dive into Anthony Bourdain’s puzzling family history, as he takes a trip to Paraguay and experiences the rich culture and savory local dishes.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 10/19/14. Travel with Anthony Bourdain as he gives an inside look at the Dong Ba market, Vinh Moc tunnels, Duyen Anh’s restaurant and the Citadel.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 10/26/14. Anthony Bourdain visits Tanzania, where he enjoys the island’s famous food and comes face to face with lions and elephants while on an excursion.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 05/03/15. Anthony Bourdain gets a taste of Miami with cow foot soup in Little Haiti and a personal lesson on sights and sounds from musician Questlove.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 05/10/15. Anthony Bourdain visits one of his favorite cities in Europe — Glasgow— where he makes his first stop at the Old College Bar for a pint.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown

programme.title: This Is Life with Lisa Ling

programme.title: This Is Life with Lisa Ling
programme.desc: Aired 10/07/2015. They’re America's toughest outlaws: one-percenter bikers called the Mongols. Lisa Ling explores their world.

programme.title: This Is Life with Lisa Ling
programme.desc: Aired 10/21/2015. Lisa Ling accompanies 13 inmates who are preparing for an unprecedented father-daughter dance.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers attempt to pull over a suspect who was reported to have been involved in a car-jacking. A suspect is caught in the act of burying a bag filled with illegal prescription drugs. Officers attempt to pull over a vehicle with no headlights.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A teenager who ran away from home tries running from the cops too. A man set a date to turn his life around, but deputies ask him to start earlier. A man found with hundreds of sunglasses claims he was going to give them away.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police chase a man running away from his car and a warrant, a driver is just as unlicensed as his vehicle, and a domestic violence call involves two lovers and a hammer.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police catch up to a man with warrants and a history of resisting arrest, a fidgety driver arouses suspicion, and a minor with beers in his pants has to answer to his mom.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Deputies search a suspicious vehicle behind a strip club. A man threatens to shoot employees at a car rental company. A man tosses lip balm filled with narcotics out the window during a traffic stop.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A suspect fresh out of jail is found with narcotics. A motorcycle named 'Love Machine' is saved from a hot wire. A man bursts his tire in a bad place and officers come to the rescue.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A deputy tries to cut a guy some slack after his relationship troubles got out of hand. A teenager gets a serious lesson in not drinking while underage. A couple is forced to take a raincheck on their wedding day.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An arrested man has a long list of instructions for his "bae," and a driver charged with heroin possession claims he was framed by the passenger in his backseat.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man gets busted during a drug deal, a cyclist gets confused when an officer finds narcotics in his pants, and officers respond to reports of gunfire.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A wanted man sprints across a freeway to evade police, a woman is arrested for breaking her friend's windows, and a driver tries to talk his way out of a road rage arrest.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers apprehend a skittish suspect, a father-to-be leads police on a foot chase, and police struggle to get the truth from a wanted man.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A personalized keychain casts doubt on a man’s flimsy story. A cyclist throws something behind his back as soon as deputies roll up. A laid-back driver’s estimation of what’s in his car is off by a couple trash bags.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A suspect is arrested after officers find a loaded gun during a routine search. Two men are detained after suspected of battery. During Mardi Gras officers arrest a man pickpocketing.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Fort Bend, Texas deputies arrest a man for possession of a crack pipe, and Michigan and Washington police both respond to domestic violence situations.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A bewildered driver claims that he did not see the lights or hear the sirens when he was signaled to stop. Officers investigate a call regarding a suspicious parked car. A manager of an apartment complex is assaulted by their intoxicated tenants.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police pursue a driver and his wife in a high-speed chase, a paranoid man vandalizes his roommate's car, and a shoplifter can't keep her story straight.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Detectives stop a vehicle leaving a known drug house and find a loaded concealed gun while searching one of the passengers. Local residents complain about a loud neighbor. A man is spotted walking down a road with a saw.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A very cooperative car thief tells deputies all about his good fortune. An argument over business leaves one man on the ground with a bloody mouth. The occupants of a truck are oblivious to what deputies find in the backseat.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A high speed vehicular pursuit results in a foot chase. Officers respond to a domestic call involving the residence's girlfriend and her children who destroyed the man's house. Police respond to a domestic violence call.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A runaway cyclist dips into a house to catch his breath. A deputy tries to cut a man some slack despite his mistakes. The owners of an empty house call the police when they hear someone else inside.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A driver tries to escape through an occupied driveway, a man and his dad are found possessing more than just drugs, and five teenagers learn how weed can impact their future.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers are involved in a high-speed pursuit of suspected larcenists. Officers order occupants out of a vehicle and immediately give the driver a sobriety test. Officers report to a call of a dispute in a neighborhood.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A suspect is apprehended after trying to evade arrest, a convicted felon is detained when police make some illegal discoveries in his van, and deputies seize a repeat offender.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Suspected jewelry thieves attempt a daring escape during a pursuit, a man gives officers a challenge during his arrest, and a traffic stop puts a marriage in jeopardy.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A motorcyclist wanted by police hides out in his mom's garage, a man won't leave his ex-fiancee alone, and a pregnant woman gets busted for meth possession.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Deputies confront a man holding a knife to his roommate’s neck over a prior argument. A suspect runs from deputies on a warrant charge. Suspected robbers are pulled over by deputies.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A fleeing motorcyclist crashes into an occupied trailer, a stubborn suspect plays dumb, and officers are disappointed when they run into a repeat offender.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: When the CSIs find a body near a forest reserve, they discover what might be a serial killer and his bizarre lair.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: When the CSIs investigate a triple homicide, Russell has to find a way to connect with a 6-year-old girl who was the sole survivor and witness.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSI team investigates a popular spiritual retreat when a body is found floating in a mud bath.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSI team investigates the death of a ghost hunter.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: As Russell and his team investigate a series of murders, one of their own confronts peril on a dangerous undercover mission to get close to the killer.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: D.B. Russell leads the CSI team on a hunt to find Morgan and Ellie Brass following their kidnapping by a ritualistic killer, in the 14th season premiere.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSI team is called in to investigate a murder and robbery at a poker game that had more than a million dollars in chips on the table.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSI team investigates a fire at a music venue that leaves four people dead, including two band members.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: When contestants on a reality cooking show accidentally eat human flesh during a competition, the CSI team is brought in to investigate.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Catherine Willows returns to help the CSIs solve a cold case that has haunted the team for 14 years, on the milestone 300th episode.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSI team investigates the death of a homeless man who had a huge winning streak at a small casino.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSI team investigates a John Doe found during torrential rains in Vegas. Meanwhile, Greg Sanders is investigated and accused of framing a man for murder seven years ago.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: When a man is found dead inside a human-sized hamster ball, the CSI team is brought in to investigate. Also, the team collaborates with a swing shift CSI on a case involving a serial rapist.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSI team is called in to investigate the stabbing of a couple found at a local motel that is reminiscent of two incidents that occurred in the same room.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI debe investigar a uno de los suyos cuando Langston es acusado por un antiguo colega de ser parte de los asesinatos del Dr. Jekyll. Primera parte de dos del final de temporada.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Las vidas del equipo de CSI están en juego a medida que se acercan al escurridizo Dr. Jekyll, y es posible que más de un miembro del equipo no viva para ver su captura. Segunda parte del final de temporada.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Langston lucha por su vida después de ser apuñalado por un psicópata, Nate Haskell, mientras que los otros CSI asisten a un funeral que se vuelve mortal.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: La histeria se produce cuando un tiburón ataca a una mujer en la piscina de un casino de Las Vegas. El equipo de CSI debe determinar si el asesino es humano o tiburón.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Una convención de vampiros y hombres lobo está en el corazón de una investigación del asesinato en Las Vegas.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Sqweegel, un asesino en serie que está castigando a los héroes locales que albergan secretos ocultos, está a la caza en Las Vegas..

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Una mujer que sufre de una condición llamada "acumulación" se convierte en sospechosa de asesinato cuando se encuentra un cadáver enterrado bajo pilas de basura y escombros dentro de su casa.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Cuando un estudiante universitario termina muerto después de un espectáculo de "Caminar con dinosaurios", el equipo de CSI debe determinar si su muerte fue un asesinato o un accidente.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Cuando el equipo de CSI descubre los restos destrozados de un hombre, se encuentran con múltiples sospechosos que pueden ser responsables de su muerte.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Dos hombres son asesinados justo antes de exponer a una compañía de gas natural por envenenar a residentes en una ciudad agrícola. Ahora el equipo CSI debe descubrir quién es responsable de sus muertes.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: La caída fatal de un hombre desde el balcón de un hotel lanza al equipo de CSI a una investigación para determinar si su muerte fue suicidio o el resultado de un juego sucio.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Los CSI se propusieron localizar a un pedófilo sospechoso de asesinar a la esposa de un agente del FBI y secuestrar a sus hijos.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Cuando una foto aparentemente falsa de una prostituta muerta aparece en línea, el equipo de CSI sigue una pista para encontrar a la mujer que fue asesinada.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI vinculó un cuerpo con quemaduras graves a una posible ejecución por una silla eléctrica y a un legendario asesinato en Las Vegas.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A cell phone call leads the team to investigate a kidnapping that, unless they reach the victim before it’s too late, could soon become a murder.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A young, ultra-glam heiress and media darling is found electrocuted in her bathtub during a party, and there is no shortage of suspects.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: While investigating the disappearance of a cruise ship passenger, the team discovers that a murder has also taken place on the ship.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: The CSI Team is on high alert when the deadly Mala Noche gang initiates a shooting rampage during the trial of one of their members.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio’s search for Antonio Riaz continues. The Feds take over the lab and investigate each team member when $12,000 is missing from a drug bust.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: In pursuit of Marisol's killer, Horatio and Delko go to Brazil to avenge her death. In Rio, they are close to catching Riaz, Marisol's killer.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When a male model is murdered, Horatio and the CSI team must enter the high stakes world of modeling in order to find the killer.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: After a celebrity is murdered at an A-list party, the CSIs uncover a counterfeit ring producing a hundred dollar bills. Horatio investigates.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: The team must investigate when Calleigh is run off the road into a canal, compromising crime scene evidence she just collected.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: After an entire neighborhood learns that they are being forced out of their homes, the local politician supporting eminent domain is murdered.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: The CSIs must investigate a strange case involving voodoo and are spooked when bizarre accidents start happening around the lab.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A kidnapping case becomes personal for Horatio and the CSI team when the victim unexpectedly turns out to be Boa Vista's sister.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When a man is decapitated while doing a daring stunt with his car, the team suspects that it was more than just an accident.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio uncovers a deadly plot against the City of Miami after a young woman is murdered at a charity event. He and the CSI team investigate.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI hace un descubrimiento impactante sobre su víctima de asesinato, mientras Horatio intenta salvar a su hijo de la conducta errática de Julia.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Cuando una azafata es asesinada en vuelo, Horatio Caine y el equipo de CSI descubren todos los trapos sucios de los viajes en avión.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Una violación de domicilio se vuelve mucho más que eso cuando Horatio Caine y el equipo de CSI descubren que son el blanco de la mafia rusa.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Cuando la vida de un niño inocente está en peligro, Ryan, a la larga, se ve obligado a traicionar a Horatio Caine y al resto del equipo de CSI.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Un caso de asesinato que involucra cirugía plástica extrema conduce a Horatio Caine hasta Ron Saris, que está vivo y busca vengarse de Julia.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Cuando una estrella de telerrealidad es asesinada, Horatio Caine y el equipo de CSI se adentran en el mundo escandaloso y sensual de un programa de televisión de citas.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio Caine y el equipo de CSI trabajan para averiguar por qué una familia aparentemente normal fue blanco de un brutal ataque con granadas.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI investiga el caso de un hombre hervido vivo, Julia se descontrola y uno de los secretos más oscuros del equipo sale a la luz.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio lucha para salvar a Yelina y cuando Delko se opone a la súplica de Calleigh y ayuda a su peligroso padre, su vida corre peligro.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Mientras la vida de Delko pende de un hilo, Horatio vuelve 12 años en el tiempo para revelar cómo se conocieron y se convirtieron en un equipo los CSI de Miami.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Cuando atacan el laboratorio, Horatio debe atender la única solicitud de un hombre armado para salvar a cinco rehenes, incluido el nuevo CSI Jesse Cardoza.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Tres jugadores de vóleibol caen muertos misteriosamente en la cancha mientras el testimonio de Calleigh contra Delko amenaza su futuro como CSI.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Cuando el hombre más odiado de Miami es asesinado, Horatio Caine y el equipo de CSI van a la caza de su asesino y su tesoro escondido.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Alexx Woods y Eric Delko regresan para ayudar a Horatio Caine y al equipo de CSI a detener un brote viral mortal en la hermosa Miami.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The CSI New York team investigates a 1920s-inspired speakeasy when one of its owners is murdered and $10,000 goes missing.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The CSI New York team is confronted with a puzzling mystery when two different victims are linked by the same unusual weapon.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: When a beloved off-duty NYPD officer perishes in a robbery, the CSIs use the art of interrogation to break down their suspects and get to the truth.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The CSIs investigate when a masked man is found at the bottom of a notorious skyscraper known for its history of mysterious deaths.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: When a young pizza maker is carjacked, the CSI New York team of investigators must determine what the perpetrators were really after.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Mac and the team partner with D.B. Russell to outsmart Christine’s kidnappers before they run out of time to save her life.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: On Valentine's Day, Detective Mac Taylor and the rest of the CSI New York team tackle three twisted tales of love gone wrong.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Community unrest over the police shooting of an unarmed man forces Mac and the CSI New York team to move quickly to solve the case.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Detective Mac Taylor discovers the body of a woman in Brooklyn Heights, when his investigation leads him to a serial killer.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Detective Mac Taylor and Danny Messer go underground, entering the world of the ‘Sandhogs,’ men who burrow beneath New York City.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Detectives Stella Bonasera and Danny Messer’s mission to find a brutal rapist is hindered, as the victim has no memory of the assault.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A practical joke spirals into a century spanning murder mystery when a skeleton placed on a tour bus turns out to be authentic.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: CSIs Investigate when New York’s hottest DJ is found dead minutes before being crowned the undisputed “scratching” champion.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The brutal stabbing of a young woman leads Detectives Mac Taylor and Stella Bonasera to Stuyvesant Town, the middle-class epicenter of New York City.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Crisis de identidad (S7 Ep18)
programme.desc: Jo equilibra los desafíos personales y profesionales cuando su hija adoptiva, Ellie, es la testigo clave en la investigación de un asesinato.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Comida con sentimiento (S7 Ep19)
programme.desc: El equipo entra en el competitivo mundo de los camiones de comida gourmet cuando uno explota en un festival de comida de SoHo mientras Hawkes está ahí con su novia.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Nada a cambio (S7 Ep20)
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI investiga la muerte de una mujer como obra de un asesino en serie. Mac vuelve a ponerse en contacto con su primer compañero después de que un ex convicto empieza a acosarlo.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Cadena perpetua (S7 Ep21)
programme.desc: Después de que una lluvia de disparos cruza el laboratorio de criminalística, Mac y su excompañero se convierten en parte de una venganza que lleva 17 años.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Estrategia de salida (S7 Ep22)
programme.desc: Después de una experiencia cercana a la muerte, el detective Mac Taylor está bastante decidido a cerrar su último caso sin resolver.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Imborrable (S8 Ep1)
programme.desc: En el décimo aniversario del 11 de setiembre, Mac y el equipo recuerdan momentos específicos de ese día que les quedaron grabados de forma indeleble en la mente.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Hazlo realidad (S8 Ep2)
programme.desc: Cuando encuentran muerto a un adolescente torpe, el equipo descubre que sus esfuerzos por conquistar el corazón de una atractiva roquera punk pueden haber ido demasiado lejos.

programme.title: CSI: New York: El caballero andante (S8 Ep3)
programme.desc: Cuando encuentran el cuerpo de una hermosa joven en una Ferrari robada, la investigación conduce a una familia de ladrones de autos.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Oficial involucrado (S8 Ep4)
programme.desc: Una salida nocturna amistosa para tomar un trago sufre un cambio inesperado cuando Danny y sus policías novatos se ven envueltos en un tiroteo.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Las apariencias engañan (S8 Ep5)
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI de Nueva York investiga cuando el hermano de un joven prodigio del básquet, recientemente liberado bajo palabra, está involucrado en un asesinato.

programme.title: CSI: New York: ¡Déjenme salir! (S8 Ep6)
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI investiga cuando una broma de fraternidad en el Día de Brujas sale mal y un maestro de ceremonias es dado por muerto en una tumba abierta.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Juego siniestro (S8 Ep7)
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI investiga cuando la noticia de una fiesta en una escuela secundaria se vuelve viral, lo que da lugar a una aglomeración, un porche colapsado y la muerte de una adolescente.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Intercepción (S8 Ep8)
programme.desc: Mientras el equipo de CSI de Nueva York investiga el asesinato de un juez, Jo se encuentra cara a cara con un criminal de su pasado.

programme.title: CSI: New York: 48 horas antes (S8 Ep9)
programme.desc: Cuando un testigo importante aparece muerto, Jo se ve envuelta en la peligrosa investigación del presunto violador que liberaron cuando ella trabajaba en Washington D.C.
